summary_en: 550,000 shares (2.5% of shares outstanding) up to ¥200M; execution May 15 – Jul 14, 2026; trust-based open-market purchase (ToSTNeT-3); shares not allocated to stock compensation to be cancelled.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Related to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Pursuant to the Company's Articles of Incorporation based on Company Law Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: CELM, Inc. announced on May 14, 2026 that its board of directors has authorized the acquisition of up to 550,000 treasury shares (2.5% of shares outstanding) for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥200 million. The acquisition will be executed through a trust-based open-market purchase method (ToSTNeT-3) during the period from May 15, 2026 through July 14, 2026. The company stated that the rationale is to execute flexible capital policy in response to changes in the operating environment. Treasury shares acquired will be held for stock compensation programs or cancelled, with cancellation being the default treatment for shares not allocated to employee stock-based compensation.
